data.title: Sui Partners with 21Shares to Enhance Global Access and Institutional Interest
data.description: According to PANews, Sui has formed a strategic partnership with 21Shares to broaden global access and increase institutional interest in the Sui ecosystem. This collaboration aims to leverage 21Shares' expertise in financial products to enhance the reach and appeal of Sui's offerings.

data.title: Binance announces the participation threshold for NXPC airdrop, 187 points are required to participate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced the participation threshold for the NXPC airdrop. Users must reach 187 Alpha points to participate. In addition, users with points 143-186 (inclusive) and a Binance account UID ending with 9 are also eligible. Receiving the NXPC airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points. According to previous news, the HODLer airdrop has been launched on Nexpace (NXPC), and spot trading will be launched at 15:30 today.

data.title: Nebraska Lawmakers Approve Crypto Mining Limits in Final Reading
data.description:
If signed by the Governor, Nebraska's bill would take effect this October, regulating crypto miners using over 1 MW of electricity.
source: https://decrypt.co/320160/nebraska-lawmakers-approve-crypto-mining-limits-in-final-reading

data.title: Bitcoin Tops $104K as Global Market Momentum Outpaces Korean Demand
data.description:
Bitcoin has continued its steady ascent, with the asset now trading above $103,000. This marks a 0. 4% decrease over the last 24 hours and more than 20% over the past month. While the rally has reaffirmed bullish sentiment in broader markets, recent data points to a shift in the sources driving this momentum
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-tops-104k-as-global-market-momentum-outpaces-korean-demand/

data.title: A whale address deposited 1,610 ETH into HTX in the past 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a whale address deposited 1,610 ETH (about 4.21 million US dollars) into HTX in the past 24 hours, making a profit of 2.64 million US dollars.
It is reported that the whale address had previously accumulated 2,673.6 ETH, and the funds in the wallet came from FixedFloat. The wallet still holds 1,064 ETH, worth 2.75 million US dollars.

data.description:
In a recent interview on the “Crypto Beat” podcast, MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay hinted that a token could still happen, simply saying “Maybe,” with a knowing smile. While that’s far from confirmation, it’s a clear sign the idea …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/metamask-co-founder-says-mask-token-still-in-talks/

data.title: Chainalysis CEO offers a clue into the recent spate of Paris crypto attacks
data.description:
Some criminal organizations are yet to receive the memo — crypto is traceable — and could explain the recent string of crypto-related kidnappings, says Chainalysis CEO Jonathan Levin.  Law enforcement has been increasingly successful at tracing stolen funds and crypto ransom payments, resulting in a “lot of arrests,” Levin said during the 2025 Consensus crypto conference, covered by Cointelegraph. “For whatever reason, there is a perception that’s out there that crypto is an asset that is untraceable, and that really lends itself to criminals acting in a certain way,” he said.  “Apparently, the know that crypto is not untraceable hasn't been received by some of the organized crime groups that are actually perpetrating these attacks, and some of them are concentrated in, you know, France, but not exclusively
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/paris-attacks-criminals-see-crypto-untraceable-chainalysis?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Solana (SOL) Finds Support — Rally May Be Ready to Resume
data.description:
Solana started a fresh increase above the $175 zone. SOL price is now correcting gains and might find bids near the $172 support zone. SOL price started a fresh upward move above the $160 and $165 levels against the US Dollar. The price is now trading near $175 and the 100-hourly simple moving average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/solana-sol-finds-support-172/

data.title: Charles Hoskinson’s Midnight Airdrop Targets 37M Wallets, Excludes VCs
data.description:
Speaking at Consensus 2025, he revealed fresh details about the upcoming Glacier Drop, a massive airdrop tied to Cardano’s privacy-focused sidechain, Midnight. This airdrop targets 37M wallets across 8 blockchains for their native currency, including BTC, ETH, ADA, XRP, SOL, BSC, AVAX, and POL, distributing NIGHT either DUST. …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/charles-hoskinsons-midnight-airdrop-targets-37m-wallets-excludes-vcs/

data.title: A certain whale address bought 100 million JELLYJELLY yesterday, and now has a floating loss of 1.35 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a whale address withdrew 100.46 million JELLYJELLY coins from Gate yesterday, worth 4.45 million US dollars, and has currently lost 1.35 million US dollars.

data.title: Binance HODLer Airdrop will be listed on Nexpace (NXPC)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance HODLer airdrop will be launched on Nexpace (NXPC) at 15:30. USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD and TRY trading pairs will be opened, and seed tags will be added.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Says Once Bitcoin Hits $500,000 It Will Be Considered An Asset Class Just Like Gold
data.description:
Anthony Scaramucci, the founder and CEO of SkyBridge Capital, said Wednesday that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) would be deemed a full-fledged asset class once it hits $500,000 a piece. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/25/05/45427302/anthony-scaramucci-forecasts-bitcoin-will-be-deemed-asset-class-akin-to-gold-when-it-reaches-500000?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: BitMEX launches LAUNCHCOIN perpetual contract, supporting up to 12.5x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On May 15, BitMEX announced that it had launched the LAUNCHCOIN perpetual contract at 04:00 (UTC time) on the same day. Users can trade through the LAUNCHCOIN/USDT trading pair, supporting up to 12.5x leverage.
